guidance: Aspires to grow order book toward Rs20,000cr by FY27, driven by renewables and BESS.
Diversifying from telecom towers into solar EPC, BESS and IPP ownership.
insights: FY26 revenue Rs2,843cr up 81%; net profit Rs211cr; Q4 revenue Rs914cr up 28% YoY.
Order book Rs7,147cr at Mar-2026, led by renewable/solar EPC and BESS projects.
Separate Rs9,000cr, 2GW IPP project in Andhra Pradesh in land-pooling stage, housed in dedicated SPV.
New integrated Hyderabad manufacturing facility planned, capex Rs120-130cr.
concall.orderExecution: Rs7,147cr book largely executable over ~12-18 months, supporting the guided 60-70% FY27 growth; the 2GW IPP is a longer multi-year build.
concall.source: Q4/FY26 post-earnings concall 28-Apr-2026; scanx.trade, ConstructionWorld, screener.in

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
